name: Magic Lemon Meringue Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. In a medium bowl, beat egg yolks. Stir in condensed milk, lemon juice, and lemon rind.
3. Pour the mixture into the pastry shell.
4. In a small bowl, beat egg whites with cream of tartar until foamy. Gradually add sugar, beating until stiff but not dry.
5. Spread meringue over the top of the pie, carefully sealing it to the edge of the shell.
6. Bake for 15 minutes or until the meringue is golden brown.
7. Cool and chill before serving.
8. Refrigerate leftovers.
Makes 1 - 8 or 9 inch pie
